summary: Use deep containers and mulch to reduce evaporation; favor early varieties; prioritize soil moisture monitoring.

steps.title: Container depth
steps.body: Choose at least 15–20 gallon equivalent depth for maincrop types; deeper is better for drought buffering.

steps.title: Mulch
steps.body: Apply organic mulch after plants emerge to cut surface evaporation.

requirements.notes: Irrigate deeply but less frequently once established; avoid constant shallow wetting.

hazard_links.mitigation_detail: Improve airflow in dense foliage; avoid wetting leaves late in the day; remove infected lower leaves per local potato disease IPM.
Hill soil to exclude light from tubers; store harvested tubers in darkness.
hazard_links.evidence_notes: Align with local extension potato storage guidance.

hazard_links.mitigation_detail: Use free-draining container mix; empty saucers; water deeply but only when soil dries appropriately for the growth stage.

summary: Amaranth tolerates heat and moderate water stress once established; still needs establishment water.

steps.title: Establishment
steps.body: Water seedlings regularly for 2–3 weeks; reduce frequency as roots deepen.

hazard_links.mitigation_detail: Row cover during peak flea-beetle pressure; rotate with non-host crops; hand-pick or use labeled controls per extension.

climate_context: Example (India / global): tropical to subtropical; often grown kharif with monsoon rain. USDA zones optional; use local ag advisories for your state.

summary: Grow in imported clean soil in raised beds to bypass unknown native urban soil.

steps.title: Bed fill
steps.body: Use tested compost and topsoil from reputable suppliers; capillary break if needed.

hazard_links.mitigation_detail: Raised bed with clean fill reduces uptake pathway from legacy site soil.
hazard_links.evidence_notes: Still test irrigation water if suspect.

summary: SPECULATIVE: legumes are studied for stress physiology; this row is for schema demo only—not prescriptive for radiation disasters.

steps.title: Disclaimer
steps.body: Do not use this text for safety decisions; consult radiological agriculture experts and official guidance.
